deviations.reason: CEO override to run 00c before 00b close-out; lesson #38 four-piece record path complete.

__main__.py hardcoded NoopHost; added --use-nt-host flag so the CLI can select NtTradingNodeHost (needed for testnet example). Not a gate bypass — the G6 gate still guards every live deploy. team-lead APPROVED (task #6); 3 action items applied: (1) renamed --nt-host->--use-nt-host, (2) mandatory docs sync (nautilus_host.md + reconcile.md + README footnote), (3) 5 safety-validator anchors + NT-missing fail-fast TDD case. Commits 416d182 (initial) + 93365c7 (rename+test) + docs commit.

plan decision was env-var mock vault, but the mock CredentialVault returns a placeholder without api_key/secret and an env-var key vault would contradict red line 0.1; example uses the shipped SopsAgeVault (non-custodial) with .env holding only non-secret config.
parametrized build_data_client_config with environment + data_environment_for_mode so testnet feeds testnet market data (else live prices vs testnet exec mismatch). Within Task 3 correctness scope.

initial `ls examples/` hit an eza alias that errored; `|| echo` misread the tool error as absence. supertrend-sandbox existed (Plan 00a); caught during Task 4, aligned testnet example to sandbox conventions + synced sandbox README. lesson #9 (tool error != absence).
packet §5 named test_case_variants; the real function is test_g6_gate_rejects_live_noophost. Contract table uses real test names (lesson #9/#25). team-lead task #5.

codex L1 APPROVE_WITH_FOLLOW_UPS stretch patches: F1 base-install NT-missing test (bypass importorskip skip), F2 undeclared-capability structured reject (getattr-default-False, orthogonal to packet §10), F3 unknown-mode explicit boundary tests (kept LIVE fallback; dispatch already rejects). No main-contract change. Commits 93365c7/5f7bf12/c693504.

red_lines_check.grep_evidence: log.*api_key none; SKIP_G6/BYPASS none; stop_all_strategies none; float( in 3 touched files none; external venue client outside nautilus_host.py none

self_reflect.round_1: found + fixed: G6 code_hash layer would hash the process CWD when strategy_path missing (Path('').parent == '.'); now refused explicitly with reason=missing_strategy_path + relaxed-double test (7513d97).
self_reflect.round_2: clean — 4 red-line greps all pass; no additional issues.
